allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -notlike '\\''127.*'\\'' -and $_.IPAddress -notlike '\\''169.*'\\'' } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host '\\''--- Puerto 8003 escuchando? ---'\\''; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8003 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count')
